Alright, to create a pixel, if you don't have one already created, you should see create a pixel up here somewhere on this page, data sources, and how I get there is if you're on your ads manager page, say this is where it loads you to when you click on ads, you just come up here to the three lines, click on pixels, and your data sources, that's going to be your Facebook pixel. So if you don't have one, go ahead and create one, it'll come up like this, you'll manually enter the code yourself, click on the middle one on number two, and come over here to your funnel, and I'll go ahead and search for mine. What you will probably do is you'll probably hit browse funnels and then click the funnel that you've been working on. And then once you're here to install the pixel, you go to settings, head tracking code, I always like to expand the box a little bit where I can see what I'm doing, delete whatever is in there, and remember this is the code that we've copied, and we're going to go ahead and paste this guy in there. Once you paste it in there, scroll all the way down, save and update your settings, and then you'll come back over to your pixel, scroll all the way down. If you haven't set up a pixel already, you will grab your opt-in link here, copy this guy, and then it'll have a box for you to paste a URL in. Go ahead and paste your opt-in link there, and then send activity, and then that'll get your pixel started. I'll send you another video on how to do the custom conversion, but you will not be able to create a custom conversion until you get some activity on your pixel.
